message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on doctest toOwnedSlice operations

Fixed silent data loss in doctest example parsing:

Lib/doctest.zig:
- toOwnedSlice() for source/want strings now panics on OOM instead of returning empty strings
- formatFailure() now panics on OOM instead of returning empty string

Returning empty strings on OOM would cause incorrect doctest examples/output.

All changed from 'catch ""' to 'catch unreachable'.
